title: Eufloria HD
description:
WHAT'S THE DIFFERENCE?

JOIN OUR DISCORD

Об игреCheck out Bioframe Outpost, the newest game from the co-creators of Eufloria! 

AboutExperience the celebrated strategy gameplay of indie hit Eufloria HD.  

Conquer asteroids in space and use their resources to grow floral creatures that do the player's bidding. Expand your empire and fight for resources against several teams of AI opponents that all vie for the same resources and can offer fierce opposition.

Eufloria HD enhances the original Eufloria release with new mechanics, streamlined UI, ultrabalanced gameplay & more, without losing any of its unique floral space-empires charms.

Features 

• A 25 level “Story Mode” with many hours of gameplay.

• “Relaxed Mode”, for a more ambient experience which anyone can enjoy.

• “Skirmish Levels” that can be played over and over.

• “Dark Matter Mode” for a stylish, more challenging way to play.

• Original ambient soundtrack by “Milieu”.

• Many procedurally generated levels which are different every time!

• Includes official Linux/OSX version for the first time!
description_short: Experience the celebrated strategy gameplay of Eufloria HD. Conquer asteroids in space and use their resources to grow floral creatures that do your bidding. Expand your empire and fight against several teams of AI opponents that all vie for the same resources and can offer fierce opposition.
